title: Add GIF polish — mirroring, NSFW, pagination
description: BUD-04 mirroring (PUT /mirror) for GIF redundancy across Blossom servers. BUD-05 /media endpoint support for server-side optimization. Infinite scroll pagination for GIF grid. NSFW content filtering from NIP-94 metadata. Accessibility audit pass. Include tests. Depends on GIF picker UI.

title: Add Blossom server list and settings UI
description: Kind 10063 server list model (BUD-03), @MainActor-isolated BlossomServerListManager, MediaServerSettingsView for add/edit/remove servers and mirror config, ConfigView + Router integration. nostrdb for persistence. Include tests. Depends on Blossom core commit.

title: Add GIF picker UI and PostView integration
description: GIFPickerItem model, GIFPickerViewModel (@MainActor, enum-based state, task cancellation), GIFPickerView (2-col LazyVGrid, KFAnimatedImage with correct .imageContext for animation caching fix from PR #2387, blurhash placeholders, search bar). PostView integration: GIF button in attachment bar, .sheet presenting picker, selected GIF URL added to uploadedMedias, NIP-94 event published alongside note on send only. Relay-only source — no Tenor, no Klipy. Accessibility: 44pt touch targets, Dynamic Type, VoiceOver. Include tests. Depends on relay discovery + kind:1 scour.

title: Add GIF relay discovery (kind 1063 query)
description: Query connected relays for kind 1063 events filtered by m=image/gif. Client-side search across content, alt text, summary, tags. Deduplication by SHA-256 hash. nostrdb caching of discovered GIF metadata. Background thread for relay queries. Include tests. Depends on NIP-94 model.

title: Add NIP-94 FileMetadata model (kind 1063)
description: FileMetadata with full NIP-94 tag support (url, m, x, ox, size, dim, blurhash, thumb, alt, fallback, summary, service). Tag serialization/deserialization, nostrdb integration, ImageMetadata conversion layer. Add NostrKind.file_metadata = 1063, handle in HomeModel. Publish on post send only — not on GIF selection (avoids orphaned events from PR #3264). Include tests. Depends on Blossom core.

title: Add Blossom types, auth, and uploader
description: BlossomTypes (server URL with HTTPS-only validation, blob descriptor, errors), BlossomAuth (kind 24242, base64 header encoding), BlossomUploader (PUT /upload, streaming SHA256, progress tracking). Fix PR #3438 review issues: HTTPS-only, streaming hash for large files, thread safety. Include tests. Cherry-pickable foundation commit.

comments.author: e
comments.text: Build succeeds, 23/23 tests pass. Files: BlossomTypes.swift, BlossomAuth.swift, BlossomUploader.swift, BlossomTests.swift. Added NostrKind cases: file_metadata (1063), blossom_server_list (10063), blossom_auth (24242). Updated HomeModel.swift and LoadableNostrEventView.swift for exhaustive switch handling.

title: Add kind:1 GIF link scour for bootstrap catalog
description: Background scan of kind:1 notes already in nostrdb for embedded GIF URLs. URL detection via NSDataDetector + known CDN patterns (giphy, imgur, tenor, nostr.build, blossom servers). HEAD request verification to confirm Content-Type is image/gif (rate-limited, background queue). Auto-generate local-only kind 1063 metadata and store in nostrdb as local catalog index. Does NOT publish to relays — local discovery only. Solves cold-start problem: GIF picker has content from day one bootstrapped from GIFs already on user's feed. Include tests. Depends on NIP-94 model.
